perturbation.original_text: 4. Prices and Terms. The price for the Product as set forth in Section 9 herein, sold by SIERRA to ENVISION, shall be subject to change due to changes in manufacturing costs and so as to maximize profits; any changes in price for the Product shall not be applicable to previously accepted orders and shall be made with at least ninety (90) days advance notice in writing and in good faith by conference of the parties. ENVISION shall not resell the Product alone. Terms of payment will be 1/3 upon placement of order and 2/3 balance net thirty (30) days or as mutually agreed upon in writing between the parties. Delivery will be F.O.B. ENVISION shall be responsible for all costs of shipping from SIERRA to ENVISION.
perturbation.changed_text: 4. Prices and Terms. The price for the Product as set forth in Section 9 herein, sold by SIERRA to ENVISION, shall be subject to change at SIERRA's sole discretion, with no advance notice required. ENVISION shall not resell the Product alone. Terms of payment will be 1/3 upon placement of order and 2/3 balance net thirty (30) days or as mutually agreed upon in writing between the parties. Delivery will be F.O.B. ENVISION shall be responsible for all costs of shipping from SIERRA to ENVISION.
perturbation.explanation: This change allows SIERRA to change prices without any notice, contradicting the original requirement of a ninety-day written notice and good faith negotiation. This creates a conflict in Section 4 with Section 9 where the original price is referenced, as the price in Section 9 could be interpreted as fixed, while Section 4 now allows arbitrary changes, creating ambiguity over the price adjustment process.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 9. Purchase Requirements. During the term of this Agreement, ENVISION will exclusively purchase the Product from SIERRA. The parties mutually agree to the Purchase Price of: Product Purchase Price ----------------------------------------------- A. SierraSil Per Sierra Sil's wholesale price list.
perturbation.justification: The changed text removes the requirement for ninety (90) days advance notice for price changes, giving SIERRA sole discretion and negating the prior notice requirement. This directly contradicts Section 9, which references a 'Purchase Price' seemingly fixed at Sierra's wholesale price list, creating ambiguity about how and when prices can be changed during the agreement term. This ambiguity leads to a strong in-text contradiction, as it is unclear whether the price in Section 9 is subject to arbitrary change or remains fixed as initially implied.

perturbation.original_text: 6. Sales Disclosures. ENVISION will provide SIERRA with demand projections for the Product and SIERRA will produce enough Product to meet such demand projections. ENVISION will inform SIERRA of committed sales and SIERRA will increase or scale up its production of the Product accordingly. SIERRA will not unreasonably withhold the Product, but shall not be liable for unfulfilled or partially fulfilled orders given just cause for such action.
perturbation.changed_text: 6. Sales Disclosures. ENVISION will provide SIERRA with suggested demand projections for the Product; however, SIERRA's production is based on its capacity and is not obligated to meet ENVISION's projections. ENVISION will inform SIERRA of committed sales. SIERRA may withhold the Product at its discretion and shall not be liable for any unfulfilled orders.
perturbation.explanation: This change modifies SIERRA's obligation to meet ENVISION's demand projections, making it optional. This contradicts Section 2, which requires ENVISION to fulfill "the terms and conditions of the best efforts marketing requirements" which is now undermined by SIERRA's ability to not produce the amount required to fulfill said marketing efforts.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 2. Appointment. SIERRA hereby appoints ENVISION as its exclusive distributor for the Product in any blend with Krill Oil within the Territory subject to ENVISION fulfilling the terms and conditions of the best efforts marketing requirements set forth herein in Sections 4, 5, and 9. SIERRA shall cease making sales to any customer or distributor who, during the term of this Agreement, violates ENVISION's exclusivity.
perturbation.justification: The modified text significantly weakens SIERRA's obligation to meet ENVISION's demand projections. Previously, SIERRA was required to 'produce enough Product to meet such demand projections'. The change makes this optional, stating SIERRA's production 'is not obligated to meet ENVISION's projections'. This directly contradicts Section 2, where ENVISION's exclusive distributorship is 'subject to ENVISION fulfilling the terms and conditions of the best efforts marketing requirements'. If SIERRA is not obligated to produce enough product to meet demand, ENVISION cannot fulfill its marketing obligations, thus creating a direct conflict and a strong in-text contradiction.
